home.title: Digiskills portal
home.welcome: Welcome to the Digiskills app. Discover your digital skills level and get recommended courses.

assessment.title: Digital Assessment
assessment.subtitle: DigComp 2.1 · 8 steps · ~5 minutes
assessment.description: Test your digital competencies in 5 areas: information literacy, communication, content creation, security, and problem solving. Based on results you will get recommended courses.

companyReport.title: Company Assessment Report
companyReport.subtitle: For leadership · Aggregated results · Market benchmark
companyReport.description: Overview of company-wide digital competencies: Digiskills Index, market comparison, talent pipeline, strategic priorities and recommended company courses.

assessment.title: Digital Assessment
assessment.subtitle: DigComp 2.1 competency mapping · Choose how to complete
assessment.formOptionDesc: Go through steps from identification to individual competencies and submission.
assessment.chatbotOptionDesc: Answer questions in a friendly chat – type or speak.
assessment.introDesc: Verify and complete your basic details.
assessment.digitalRelationship: Your overall relationship with digital technologies (1 = I avoid them, 10 = I'm a tech enthusiast)
assessment.aiBonusDesc: Optional section focused on AI knowledge and usage.
assessment.aiKnowledge: AI knowledge: How advanced do you consider yourself in using generative AI (e.g. writing prompts, generating text or images)?
assessment.aiTools: Which AI features in Microsoft do you know or use?
assessment.beforeSubmitDesc: After clicking Submit, the evaluation will be generated and the report displayed.

form.name: Name
form.enterTip: Tip: you can use Enter to continue quickly.

assessmentChatbot.intro: Hey, you can type or even speak – I'll handle it. Let's go – I have a few questions about your digital skills.
assessmentChatbot.placeholder: Type your answer or click the microphone...
assessmentChatbot.question1: How well do you search and evaluate information? You can give a number 1–10 or describe it in words.
assessmentChatbot.question2: How confident are you in digital collaboration? Teams, document sharing, online meetings – how does it work for you?
assessmentChatbot.question3: How do you handle content creation? Word, PowerPoint, automation – what do you use and how confident are you?
assessmentChatbot.question4: How confident are you in security? Phishing, passwords, MFA – do you pay attention to that?
assessmentChatbot.question5: How do you handle technical problems? Do you call IT or solve it yourself?
assessmentChatbot.question6: How do you use AI at work? Copilot, Dictation, or still mostly experimenting?
assessmentChatbot.defaultAnswer1: Pretty well, I handle filters and search, about 7 out of 10.
assessmentChatbot.defaultAnswer2: I use Teams and Outlook daily, document sharing is routine for me. 8.
assessmentChatbot.defaultAnswer3: I master Word and PowerPoint, could be better with automation – 6.
assessmentChatbot.defaultAnswer4: I watch out for phishing, MFA is on. I feel pretty confident, 7.
assessmentChatbot.defaultAnswer5: I look up instructions, usually solve it myself. I only call IT when it's really complex – 8.
assessmentChatbot.defaultAnswer6: I occasionally try Copilot, use Dictation. Still mostly experimenting – 6.

assessmentSummary.aiFeedback1: You have a solid foundation. Focus on exploring new tools and don't be afraid to experiment – every step forward counts.
assessmentSummary.aiFeedback2: You handle technology with confidence. If you focus on automation and AI tools, you'll gain hours of time each week.
assessmentSummary.aiFeedback3: You're above average. Your knowledge allows you to mentor colleagues and actively contribute to digital transformation.
assessmentSummary.aiFeedback4: Congratulations! You're among digital leaders. Your expertise can shape the digital strategy of the entire organization.

manager.halfwayText: You're halfway through the company journey. This week AI is the most trending topic.
manager.teamPath: Our team's path: Where we're heading

profile.continueText: Continue developing your digital competencies. You're off to a great start this week – keep going.

firma.bulkReminderTitle: Bulk reminder to complete assessment by email
firma.evaluateDesc: Once sufficient participation is reached, proceed to company evaluation.
firma.evaluationDialogText: Do you want to proceed with company-wide evaluation?
firma.sendDialogTitle: Send email to {count} people who haven't completed the assessment
firma.sendDialogConfirm: Do you really want to send a reminder to these employees?
firma.initialEmailBody:
Subject: Reminder to complete Digiskills assessment

Hello,

please complete the Digiskills assessment. Your responses will help us evaluate the current level of digital skills in the company and prepare targeted training recommendations.

Assessment link: https://digiskills.example.com/assessment

Thank you for your cooperation.

companyReport.course1Desc: Simplify routine tasks and save hours of work per week.
companyReport.course2Title: Basics of working with AI tools
companyReport.course2Desc: Discover how Copilot and other AI tools can help you be more productive.
companyReport.course3Desc: Protect data, recognize threats and work safely online.
companyReport.course4Desc: Work with spreadsheets, charts and formulas effectively and clearly.
companyReport.course5Desc: Learn advanced techniques for team communication and online meetings.

courseDetail.tipText: When you get stuck while studying, take a minute break. A short breather often opens new solutions. Need help? Use the chat in the bottom right.
